Electrical and Utility Contractor

E.C. Power & Lighting Ltd. is a leading electrical contractor specializing in Traffic Signals, Street Lighting, Underground Utilities and Electrical Installations. We are a family owned and operated business which continues to maintain its core family values in every aspect of the business… .

Electrical and Utility Contractor

E.C. Power & Lighting Ltd. is a leading electrical contractor specializing in Traffic Signals, Street Lighting, Underground Utilities and Electrical Installations. We are a family owned and operated business which continues to maintain its core family values in every aspect of the business… .

Contact Us

About Us

E.C. Power & Lighting Ltd. is an industry leading electrical contractor specializing in Traffic Signals, Street Lighting, Underground Utilities and Electrical Installations. We are a family owned and operated company whose family values are at its core.

See More

Our Services

We are a full-service electrical contractor, capable to complete electrical, utility and civil aspects of projects entirely in house. We look for opportunities to bring innovation and efficiency to our approach on every project, and we have the expertise to anticipate and respond to challenges.
